introSection: Space Fantasy The Ride (Japanese: スペース・ファンタジー・ザ・ライド) is a steel enclosed spinning roller coaster located at Universal Studios Japan in Osaka, Osaka, Japan.

sections.title: XR Ride rethemes
sections.content:
Since 2016, the coaster has been used as a virtual reality roller coaster called an "XR Coaster" for promotional events, mainly those based on Japanese manga, anime, or music artists. Most themes are used for the park's "Cool Japan" events.
 * Doraemon: Nobita's Sky Utopia (Tie-in to the film of the same name) (23 February - 3 September 2023)

fullText:
Space Fantasy The Ride (Japanese: スペース・ファンタジー・ザ・ライド) is a steel enclosed spinning roller coaster located at Universal Studios Japan in Osaka, Osaka, Japan.

Since 2016, the coaster has been used as a virtual reality roller coaster called an "XR Coaster" for promotional events, mainly those based on Japanese manga, anime, or music artists. Most themes are used for the park's "Cool Japan" events.
 * Doraemon: Nobita's Sky Utopia (Tie-in to the film of the same name) (23 February - 3 September 2023)
